scope.target: Make executable-tested BuildingBlocks behavior a required aggregate gate
constraints: Run the focused BuildingBlocks test project as required
Fail closed when the required route is removed

steps: Add the focused test project to the required runner
Add contract coverage for the gate route
execution.last_completed_step: Added the BuildingBlocks behavior project and its source-include evidence contract to every quick/full aggregate gate.
execution.next_action: Return to VERIFY-001 for final reconciliation and decision-required blockers.

results.summary: The aggregate gate now runs the BuildingBlocks behavior tests and fails closed if the required runner/registry route is removed.
results.residual_risk: A fresh environment still requires normal NuGet restore availability before dotnet test can execute.
